creator: jmc-freebsd2@milibyte.co.uk
text:
All ports were updated after running portsnap on 16 December.

Attempts to build digikam-kde4 fail.

[0m[ 43%] [32mBuilding CXX object digikam/CMakeFiles/digikamdatabase.dir/__/libs/threadimageio/pgfutils.o
[0m[31m[1mLinking CXX shared library ../lib/libdigikamdatabase.so
[0m/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lpgf
*** [lib/libdigikamdatabase.so.3.0.0] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/graphics/digikam-kde4/work/digikam-3.2.0/core.
*** [digikam/CMakeFiles/digikamdatabase.dir/all] Error code 1


The complete log file is attached below.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/digikam-kde4
make clean
make
